en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. A PSALM OF DAVID. A SONG. God shall arise, his enemies shall be scattered; and those who hate him shall flee before him!
zh: 願 神興起，願他的仇敵四散； 願恨惡他的人從他面前逃跑。

en: As smoke is driven away, so you shall drive them away; as wax melts before fire, so the wicked shall perish before God!
zh: 願你把他們趕散，如同煙被風吹散一樣； 願惡人在 神面前滅亡， 好像蠟在火前熔化。

en: But the righteous shall be glad; they shall exult before God; they shall be jubilant with joy!
zh: 但願義人在 神面前歡喜快樂； 願他們高興快樂。

en: Sing to God, sing praises to his name; lift up a song to him who rides through the deserts; his name is the LORD; exult before him!
zh: 你們要向 神歌唱，歌頌他的名； 為那乘車經過曠野的預備道路 ； 他的名是耶和華， 你們要在他面前歡樂。

en: Father of the fatherless and protector of widows is God in his holy habitation.
zh: 神在他的聖居所， 作孤兒的父親，作寡婦的伸冤者。

en: God settles the solitary in a home; he leads out the prisoners to prosperity, but the rebellious dwell in a parched land.
zh: 神使孤獨的有家可居住； 領被囚的出來，到豐盛之處； 唯有悖逆的住在乾旱之地。

en: O God, when you went out before your people, when you marched through the wilderness, Selah
zh: 神啊！你領著你的子民出來， 走過曠野的時候，

en: the earth quaked, the heavens poured down rain, before God, the One of Sinai, before God, the God of Israel.
zh: 地就震動， 在你面前天也落下雨來； 這西奈山在 神面前， 就是在以色列的 神面前，也要震動。

en: Rain in abundance, O God, you shed abroad; you restored your inheritance as it languished;
zh: 神啊！你降下大雨， 使你貧瘠的產業得到滋潤。

en: your flock found a dwelling in it; in your goodness, O God, you provided for the needy.
zh: 你的子民住在其中； 神啊，你滿有恩慈，為貧苦的人預備了一切。

en: The Lord gives the word; the women who announce the news are a great host:
zh: 主發出命令， 傳揚好信息的婦女就成了一大群。

en: "The kings of the armies- they flee, they flee!" The women at home divide the spoil-
zh: “帶領大軍的君王都逃跑了，逃跑了； 住在家中的婦女分得了戰利品。

en: though you men lie among the sheepfolds- the wings of a dove covered with silver, its pinions with shimmering gold.
zh: 你們躺臥在羊圈中， 如同鴿子的翅膀鍍上白銀， 羽毛鍍上黃金。”

en: When the Almighty scatters kings there, let snow fall on Zalmon.
zh: 全能者趕散境內列王的時候， 就像撒們山上下大雪。

en: O mountain of God, mountain of Bashan; O many-peaked mountain, mountain of Bashan!
zh: 巴珊山是 神的山 ； 巴珊山是多峰多嶺的山。

en: Why do you look with hatred, O many-peaked mountain, at the mount that God desired for his abode, yes, where the LORD will dwell forever?
zh: 多峰多嶺的山哪！ 你們為甚麼敵視 神所喜悅居住的山呢？ 耶和華必住在那裡，直到永遠。

en: The chariots of God are twice ten thousand, thousands upon thousands; the Lord is among them; Sinai is now in the sanctuary.
zh: 神的車馬千千萬萬； 主從西奈山來到他的聖所中 。

en: You ascended on high, leading a host of captives in your train and receiving gifts among men, even among the rebellious, that the LORD God may dwell there.
zh: 你升到高天的時候， 擄了許多俘虜； 你在人間，就是在悖逆的人當中， 接受了禮物， 使耶和華 神可以與他們同住。

en: Blessed be the Lord, who daily bears us up; God is our salvation. Selah
zh: 主，拯救我們的 神，是應當稱頌的， 他天天背負我們的重擔。

en: Our God is a God of salvation, and to GOD, the Lord, belong deliverances from death.
zh: 我們的 神是施行拯救的 神； 人能逃脫死亡，是在於主耶和華。

en: But God will strike the heads of his enemies, the hairy crown of him who walks in his guilty ways.
zh: 神必打碎仇敵的頭顱， 就是打碎那些常行在罪中的人的腦袋。

en: The Lord said, "I will bring them back from Bashan, I will bring them back from the depths of the sea,
zh: 主說：“我必使他們從巴珊回來， 使他們從海的深處回來；

en: that you may strike your feet in their blood, that the tongues of your dogs may have their portion from the foe."
zh: 好使你在他們的血中洗自己的腳 ，使你的狗的舌頭也有分舔仇敵的血。”

en: Your procession is seen, O God, the procession of my God, my King, into the sanctuary-
zh: 神啊！人人都看見你的巡行隊伍， 看見我的 神、我的君王的巡行隊伍，進入聖所。

en: the singers in front, the musicians last, between them virgins playing tambourines:
zh: 歌唱的在前頭行，作樂的走在後面， 中間還有擊鼓的少女。

en: "Bless God in the great congregation, the LORD, O you who are of Israel's fountain!"
zh: 你們要在大會中稱頌 神， 以色列的子孫 啊！你們要稱頌耶和華。

en: There is Benjamin, the least of them, in the lead, the princes of Judah in their throng, the princes of Zebulun, the princes of Naphtali.
zh: 在那裡有微小的便雅憫領導他們； 隨後的，有猶大的領袖，成群結隊， 還有西布倫和拿弗他利的領袖。

en: Summon your power, O God, the power, O God, by which you have worked for us.
zh: 神 啊！召喚你的能力吧。 神啊！堅立你為我們作成的事吧。

en: Because of your temple at Jerusalem kings shall bear gifts to you.
zh: 因為你在耶路撒冷的聖殿， 眾王都把禮物帶來獻給你。

en: Rebuke the beasts that dwell among the reeds, the herd of bulls with the calves of the peoples. Trample underfoot those who lust after tribute; scatter the peoples who delight in war.
zh: 求你斥責蘆葦中的野獸、 成群的公牛和萬民中的牛犢， 並且把貪愛銀塊的人踐踏在腳下； 求你趕散那些喜愛戰爭的民族。

en: Nobles shall come from Egypt; Cush shall hasten to stretch out her hands to God.
zh: 有使節從埃及出來， 古實人趕快向 神呈獻禮物。

en: O kingdoms of the earth, sing to God; sing praises to the Lord, Selah
zh: 地上的萬國啊！你們要歌頌 神， 你們要頌揚主。

en: to him who rides in the heavens, the ancient heavens; behold, he sends out his voice, his mighty voice.
zh: 歌頌那乘駕在自古就有的眾天之上的主； 看哪！他發出了強而有力的聲音。

en: Ascribe power to God, whose majesty is over Israel, and whose power is in the skies.
zh: 你們要承認能力是從 神而來的， 他的威榮是在以色列之上， 他的能力顯於穹蒼。

en: Awesome is God from his sanctuary; the God of Israel- he is the one who gives power and strength to his people. Blessed be God!
zh: 神啊！你在你的聖所中顯為可畏； 以色列的 神把能力和權能賜給他的子民。 神是應當稱頌的。
